name: Openwave Systems Inc.
description: Openwave Systems Inc. was a prominent software company that specialized in providing mobile data solutions and communication software for service providers globally. Originally founded as Libris in 1994, the company became a pioneer in mobile internet technology, including the development of WAP (Wireless Application Protocol) software. Openwave focused on delivering robust, secure, and scalable infrastructure for communication service providers, enabling them to manage internet protocol traffic, messaging platforms, and real-time analytics. Throughout its history, the company played a significant role in shaping mobile connectivity and large-scale messaging deployments for major telecommunications operators worldwide.
